# Google Play — sources

- API reference: https://developers.google.com/android-publisher/api-ref/rest
- Real-time notifications (RTDN):
  https://developer.android.com/google/play/billing/rtdn-reference
- Pub/Sub push auth:
  https://docs.cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/authenticate-push-subscriptions
- Financial reports (Cloud Storage only):
  https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/6135870

The adapter's field shapes were validated against Google's public Discovery document:
https://androidpublisher.googleapis.com/$discovery/rest?version=v3
